title: CatSorter Puzzle
description: A total cat chaos! These fluffy troublemakers have spread over different seats and are waiting for someone clever enough to stack them by color. Use your focus and logical thinking to get the best results in this contemplative game.
instructions: The controls are quite simple mdash just click on a cat and drag it to the seat of your choice Some cats are quite fussy and will only gather in specific places so watch out and look for a hint
